creator: guru@unixarea.de
text:
the port security/gsasl, required by jabberd for example, does not build when the package krb5-1.6.3_5 (also from the ports) is installed;

Fix: 

# pkg_delete krb5-1.6.3_5
# cd /usr/ports/security/gsasl
# make clean
# make
# make install

which worked fine;

and re-install krb5;
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/security/gsasl
# make
===>  Building for gsasl-0.2.28_1

Making all in src
Making all in src
make  all-am

-fno-strict-aliasing -pipe   -L/usr/local/lib -o gsasl gsasl.o

-lgssapi -lkrb5 -lasn1 -lcrypto -lroken -lcrypt -lcom_err
